name: Mykolaiv Oblast (Ukraine)

colors.symbolism: the lower field — wheat fields and the Black Sea steppe
the Black Sea coastline depicted as a wave separating the white and yellow fields

description: A horizontally divided flag — white above yellow — separated by a stylised blue wave running across the lower portion of the flag.
history: Adopted as the regional flag of Mykolaiv Oblast, the southern Black Sea region centred on the city of Mykolaiv (Nikolaev), historically a major Ukrainian shipbuilding centre.
